title: Integration: two_player_layout
description: integration_test/two_player_layout_test.dart — setup with playerCount=2, verify portrait orientation request, both cards stacked, top rotated 180°, tap-to-advance works across both, reset returns to setup in portrait.

title: Integration: load_game_flow
description: integration_test/load_game_flow_test.dart — mock file picker returns fixture bytes, tap Load Game on setup, land on summary page, assert displayed stats match hand-computed values from fixture.

title: Integration: full_game_flow
description: integration_test/full_game_flow_test.dart — setup 4 players (mock Scryfall), play 5 turns mixing life/cmd damage/counters, eliminate via 21 cmd damage, verify skip, undo+replay, complete game, assert summary stats.

title: Widget tests: help pages render and orientation
description: test/widget/help_pages_test.dart — both help pages render every section title; HelpLifeTracker(playerCount: 2) restores portrait on dispose, playerCount: 4 restores landscape (verify via SystemChrome platform-channel mock).

title: Widget tests: post_game_review_page
description: test/widget/post_game_review_page_test.dart — Draw toggle hides winner, save enabled after winner pick, key cards via mocked autocomplete (up to 3), fast-mana checkboxes, setReviewDetails called with correct args, copy-to-clipboard JSON dialog.

title: Widget tests: game_summary_page
description: test/widget/game_summary_page_test.dart — overall stats default view, dropdown switches to per-player view, download icon triggers mock saveFile with full game log JSON, per-player download triggers stats summary export.

title: Widget tests: counter_overlay + commander damage overlay
description: test/widget/counter_overlay_test.dart and commander_damage_overlay_test.dart — 2x2 layout for 4 items, fallback layouts, +/- callbacks, value display, close button, partner commander appears as separate cells with correct (fromIdx, cmdIdx).

title: Widget tests: player_card UI
description: test/widget/player_card_test.dart — life +/- tap targets, long-press life confirmation dialog, ELIMINATED overlay tap to undismiss, auto-elim at 0 life and 21 cmd damage, overlay button callbacks, two-player rotation.

title: Widget tests: life_tracker_page
description: test/widget/life_tracker_page_test.dart — current-turn border, tap-advance, cards-drawn auto-increment, turn count wrap, long-press undo, undo across skipped turns, central menu open, timer toggle, reset confirmation, complete-game navigation.

title: Widget tests: game_setup_page
description: test/widget/game_setup_page_test.dart — player count switching, partner reveal, unconventional toggle, life dropdown 10-100, starting player including 'Random' + partner format, navigation to LifeTrackerPage with right args.

title: Unit tests: ScryfallService with mock http
description: test/unit/scryfall_service_test.dart — searchCards URL builder for commander/partner/unconventional, length<3 short-circuit, getCardArtUrl normal vs transform, 429 retry, cache hit/expiry behavior. Uses mocktail MockClient.

title: Unit tests: player_card_state mutators
description: test/unit/player_card_state_test.dart — exercise PlayerCardState via GlobalKey: life inc/dec + elimination, lifePaid coupling, action counters, commander damage map + 21-elimination, player counters, getCurrentState snapshot, reset.

title: Unit tests: game_stats_utility
description: test/unit/game_stats_utility_test.dart — skipped-turn filtering, longestTurn picker, damage calc (first turn vs delta, partner separation), action stat increments, counter max tracking, time stats, seat number formula, review JSON.

title: Unit tests: game_logger
description: test/unit/game_logger_test.dart — recordTurn appends entries, skipped flag preserves _lastTurnEndTime, goToPreviousTurn pops/rewinds, endGame sets endTime, JSON round-trip via toJsonString/fromJson, backward-compat for missing fields.

title: Build test/helpers infrastructure
description: Create test/helpers/ with: test_app.dart (pumpApp helper), fake_scryfall_client.dart (mocktail Mock<http.Client>), fake_file_service.dart (mock GameLogFileService), and test/helpers/fixtures/finished_game.json fixture for load-game tests.

title: Create GameLogFileService wrapping FilePicker
description: New file lib/game_log_file_service.dart with thin wrappers around FilePicker.platform.pickFiles and saveFile. Wire optional injection into GameSetupPage._loadGameFromJson and GameSummaryPage save handlers. Defaults to real implementation so production behavior is unchanged.

title: Refactor ScryfallService to inject http.Client
description: Convert ScryfallService from static class to instance with constructor-injected http.Client (default = http.Client()). Keep static convenience wrappers so existing callers in commander_autocomplete.dart and game_setup_page.dart need no changes. Pure refactor — no behavior change.

title: Add mocktail and integration_test dev_dependencies
description: Add mocktail ^1.0.4 and integration_test (sdk: flutter) to pubspec.yaml dev_dependencies so we can mock http.Client and FilePicker, and run integration flows.

title: Test suite epic: comprehensive feature tests
description: Track the full test-suite implementation per plan at C:\Users\ryan9\.claude\plans\the-test-suite-for-structured-crane.md. Adds unit tests, widget tests, and integration tests covering every README feature. Includes light refactors to ScryfallService and a new GameLogFileService so external deps are mockable.
close_reason: All child issues completed; comprehensive test suite delivered

title: Add 2-player mode with portrait layout
description: Add 2 as a player-count option in setup, render a stacked portrait layout in LifeTrackerPage (top card rotated 180 degrees), and update the commander damage overlay to mirror that layout. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/i-d-like-if-the-cozy-hedgehog.md

title: Fix overlay rotation in portrait mode
description: When the LifeTracker page is rendered in portrait orientation, the player-card grid is rotated 90° via RotatedBox(quarterTurns: 1) but the full-screen overlay (Counters/Actions/Commander Damage) is not, leaving it misaligned with the rotated player cards. Wrap the overlay in the same RotatedBox(quarterTurns: 1) when isPortrait so it follows the player layout's coordinate space.
close_reason: Wrapped _buildActiveOverlay() in RotatedBox(quarterTurns: 1) when isPortrait in life_tracker_page.dart, so the overlay shares the same logical coordinate space as the rotated player layout. flutter analyze --no-pub clean.

title: Skip eliminated players' turns + long-press elimination
description: When a player is eliminated, the turn tracker still highlights them. Skip eliminated players in _nextTurn(), record skipped TurnLogEntry per skipped player, remove self-eliminate icon button, replace with long-press on life total + confirm dialog. Filter skipped entries from GameStatsUtility. See plan: ~/.claude/plans/when-a-player-is-piped-frog.md
close_reason: Implemented: TurnLogEntry.skipped field, _nextTurn skips eliminated players (bounded loop), _previousTurn auto-pops skipped entries, long-press life total + confirm dialog replaces self-eliminate icon, _hasDismissedElimination removed, GameStatsUtility filters skipped entries. flutter analyze clean.

title: Fix partner background image sizing in PlayerCard
description: In lib/player_card.dart partner backgrounds use Row(Expanded(Image.network(fit: BoxFit.cover))) which only constrains width via Expanded; the image keeps its intrinsic aspect ratio and leaves vertical empty space in each half. Fix by mirroring the CommanderDamageOverlay pattern: wrap each per-commander image in ClipRect(Stack(fit: StackFit.expand, children: [Opacity(Image(fit: BoxFit.cover))])) so it fills both dimensions of its Expanded slot.
close_reason: Mirrored the CommanderDamageOverlay tile pattern in PlayerCard: each per-commander background image is now wrapped in ClipRect(Stack(fit: StackFit.expand, children: [Opacity(Image(fit: BoxFit.cover))])) inside its Expanded Row slot. Forces the image to fill both width AND height of its half (previously only width was constrained, leaving vertical empty space for partner backgrounds).

title: Overlay refinements: enable receiver own slot, restyle counter overlay
description: Round 2 follow-ups to the full-screen overlay rework. (1) Receiver's own commander slot in the cmdr dmg overlay must be tappable so stolen-commander damage can be recorded; replace the dim/disable with a small (you) badge. (2) Counter and Action overlays look tiny at full screen; rework CounterOverlay to a fixed 2x2 grid that fills the viewport and restyle to match the life-counter visual language (large white shadowed value, dark circular icon buttons). See plan at C:\Users\ryan9\.claude\plans\testing-of-the-app-jiggly-papert.md
close_reason: Implemented round-2 overlay refinements. (1) Receiver's own slot in CommanderDamageOverlay is now fully tappable with a small (you) badge top-left, so stolen-commander damage can be recorded. (2) CounterOverlay reworked to a 2x2 grid that fills the viewport (no scrolling for the 4-item case) with life-counter visual language: titleMedium label, displaySmall white shadowed value, 36px dark circular icon buttons. Fallback GridView path retained for non-4-item callers. flutter analyze: no issues.

title: Rework overlays to full-screen with unique commander damage layout
description: Counter and Action overlays become full-screen (rotated for top-row players). Commander Damage overlay becomes a unique full-screen view mirroring the life tracker layout, where each opposing player slot shows damage that commander dealt to the receiver. Partners split slots horizontally. See plan at C:\Users\ryan9\.claude\plans\testing-of-the-app-jiggly-papert.md
close_reason: Implemented full-screen overlay rework: Counter and Action overlays now fill viewport (rotated 180 for top-row players); new CommanderDamageOverlay mirrors life tracker layout per receiver, splitting partner commanders horizontally. flutter analyze: no issues.
